title: Rostov-on-Don、Rostov Oblast — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Rostov-on-Don、Rostov Oblast的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Rostov-on-Don是Rostov Oblast的一个城市，人口约1,130,000。The capital of Southern Russia, a bustling port city on the Don River with a rich Cossack heritage and vibrant cultural life.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
